title: Curaçao at the World Cup: what the FIFA ranking does not measure
abstract: Curaçao qualified for the 2026 World Cup at FIFA rank 82. The ranking system rewards frequency of matches against high-ranked opponents, which structurally disadvantages small states with thin domestic competitions and short qualifying windows. The paper formalises the diaspora effect on national-team performance and shows that for small states with large diasporas the FIFA ranking systematically understates available quality.
